notes: Configured local TaraHome cover workflow generated the prompt/meta artifacts first. Final cover.png is a post-local product-led composite using source-backed Eve product imagery; no embedded title text, chart, decorative routing/network/path overlay, translucent panel, inset frame, floating UI card, or progress bar.
summary: Use Eve Matter-over-Thread devices directly with Home Assistant when they already support Matter, or share them from Apple Home when an older Eve device was upgraded there.
title: Can You Use Eve Matter-over-Thread Devices With Home Assistant Without Apple Home?
